title: The TRUTH Behind George W. Bush's Success

transcript.text: George W bush joined Skull and Bones
Yale and there's this kind of like thing
they do where they line up all of the
recruits and they get details from each
of them and have a little friendly
conversation with each while they're
lined up and then they try to get each
person in line to say as many names and
birthplaces of the other people in line
as possible most people only get four or
five because they're not paying that
much attention and when they got the
bush you could do all of them he
remembered all of HW or WWE the younger
one really basically the idea that the
reason he was so successful you know
regardless of he made C's in physics and
chemistry but he's a social genius ah
well he was always the one he wanted to
have a beer with yeah you know his dad
was also in skull and bones and I
believe his nickname was Magog because
that was reserved for the member who had
slept with the most
and so he was a ladies man baseball
player yeah are we rolling
